content: We can repurpose the ICM curiosity mechanism's intrinsic reward for novel state prediction error to actively guide long-context LLMs to explore underutilized long-range dependencies in their context windows, rather than relying only on superficial local pattern matching. This creates a self-motivated system where long-context LLMs intrinsically reward themselves for uncovering non-obvious long-range connections that would otherwise be missed in passive text processing.
